title: Lootrun Delight
description: This mod makes Lootruning on Wynncraft a delight by adding a challenge estimator, beacon counter, red challenge counter, a stats command to see current lootrun stats and info about when to start aqua stacking
body:
This mod makes Lootruning on Wynncraft a delight!
It includes:
- A Beacon count tracker so you know how many of each beacon are remaining which is saved on restarts and bound to classes! So no problem if you want to pause a Lootrun to Lootrun on another class! This is disabled by default and can be enabled by doing /togglebeacons
- A Beacon challenge estimator to know what challenge each beacon is and how far away it is. This is toggled off by default and can be enabled by doing /toggledestinations
- Tons of stats that you can view at any time with /lootrunstats to see total mob buffs, pulls, effective pulls and much more! This is, like the beacon, being saved class wise, so feel free to take a break!
- A red beacon counter in the Scoreboard, which means you will always know how many more challenges you have to do to get more time in your lootruns
- An aqua beacon indicator which tells you if it right now is a good idea to take the aqua beacon. This is shown in chat after the beacon options show up
